external_references.description: Conteras, T., Splunk Research Team. (2025, September 25). From Prompt to Payload: LAMEHUG’s LLM-Driven Cyber Intrusion. Retrieved April 21, 2026.
Google Threat Intelligence Group. (2025, November 5). GTIG AI Threat Tracker: Advances in Threat Actor Usage of AI Tools. Retrieved March 31, 2026.

objects.description: [LAMEHUG](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9035) has used the Hugging Face API to query the Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct LLM to generate one-line Windows commands for the collection of system information and documents in specific folders on compromised hosts. [LAMEHUG](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9035) subsequently executed the returned commands and exfiltrated the collected files and information to adversary-controlled C2 servers.(Citation: Nov AI Threat Tracker)(Citation: Splunk LAMEHUG SEP 2025)
